content.problemStatement:
Chef has forgotten his ice cream cone in the sun, and it is melting.

Currently, there is XXX grams of ice cream in his cone, and every minute that the cone is left out, YYY grams of ice cream melt and are lost.

If Chef comes back after NNN minutes, how much ice cream is still left for him?


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The first and only line of each test case contains 333 integers - XXX, YYY and NNN.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the amount of ice cream left after NNN minutes.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test Case 1 : Chef comes back after 222 minutes, and in that time 222 grams of ice cream have melted, leaving him 333 grams.
Test Case 2 : The ice cream completely melts in 555 minutes, and thus is gone by the time Chef returns.
